e.indexData['index_1']['925206']={520600,520601,520602,520603,520604,520605,520606,520607,520608,520609,520610,520611,520612,520613,520614,520615,520616,520617,520618,520619,520620,5206201,520621,520622,520623,520624,520625,5206252,520626,520627,520628,520629,520630,5206303}
end
function e.GetByIndex(t,a)
if e.indexData[t]and e.indexData[t][a]then
return e.indexData[t][a]
else
return{}
end
end
return e
